description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets the DOCKER_DRIVER variable to overlay. Add a before_script that runs `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p "$CI_BUILD_TOKEN" "$CI_REGISTRY"` to authenticate to the GitLab Container Registry. Define a deploy stage containing a `development` job that runs only on the master branch, executes `docker build -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest" .` followed by `docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest"`. Also add a `stable` job that runs only on tags, executes `docker build -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$(CI_BUILD_REF_NAME)" .` and then `docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$(CI_BUILD_REF_NAME)"`. Both jobs use the same deploy stage and push the built images to the GitLab Container Registry.
